executionHistory.summary: Greenfield analyst bootstrap for the persistent-default + hot-swap + sticky-per-user + gather-override extension of spec 088. Grounded every requirement against committed code: confirmed the open-knowledge model path (okagent.Config.Model gather = SST assistant.open_knowledge.llm_model_id; spec-087 okagent.Config.SynthesisModel = synthesis_model_id; baked at cmd/core/wiring_assistant_openknowledge.go); confirmed spec 088's per-REQUEST synthesis override (modelswitch.NewAllowlist/Resolve at internal/assistant/openknowledge/modelswitch/allowlist.go; Agent.WithModelOverride clone at agent/agent.go:268 re-points SynthesisModel ONLY, singleton never mutated, C6; SST allowlist assistant.open_knowledge.switchable_models; surfaces telegram translate_inbound.go parseModelFlag + api agent_invoke.go). Confirmed the envelope reality: config.go::validateModelEnvelopes co-residence guard (gather llm_model_id + candidate <= OllamaMemoryLimitMiB); home-lab ollama_memory_limit '28G'=28672 MiB; gemma4:26b=18432, deepseek-r1:7b=4864, deepseek-r1:32b=22528 -> 32b co-resident with gemma4:26b gather = 40960 > 28672 (structurally the model_over_memory_envelope opt-up today). Grounded the §2 footprint concern in docs/experiments/open-knowledge-synthesis-model-ab.md: 32b real footprint ~64 GB @ 131072 ctx (KV-dominated) vs 20 GB @ 4096; pipeline per_query_token_budget=128000; profile UNDERSTATES real footprint; A/B live arm fit at raised 48G envelope (82 GiB used / 26 free on 109 GiB box). Confirmed NO general per-user prefs store exists (only telegram/per_user_token.go PASETO minter); identified the spec-039 recommendation_preference_corrections actor-keyed pattern (migrations/022) as a Fork-B reuse candidate; confirmed claim-binding via spec-044 auth.Session.UserID / Bot.resolveActorUserID. Confirmed latency surface: llm_timeout_ms=600000, max_iterations=6, synthesis_retry_budget=1, WriteTimeout=(6+1)*600s=4200s. Authored spec.md: problem statement, the §2 footprint-headroom concern as a hard requirement, 7 actors, Outcome Contract (intent/success/failure-refusal/failure-condition), 13 BDD scenarios SCN-089-A01..A13, FR-1..FR-16, NFR-1..NFR-7, C1..C9 constraints, the four design forks A-D as open questions, capability foundation, Product Principle Alignment (Principle 8 + Principle 2 primary, 6 + 4 inherited), UI scenario matrix. No code written; no agents dispatched; no commit/push (C9).

UX phase (parent-expanded full-delivery). Authored specs/089/uservalidation.md: SCN-089-A01..A13 operator-checkable acceptance items (all UNCHECKED, pre-implementation, anti-fabrication) + concrete operator-verifiable strings grounded in committed config (home-lab gather=gemma4:26b, new synthesis default=deepseek-r1:32b, switchable=[deepseek-r1:32b,deepseek-r1:7b,gemma4:26b], envelope 28G->>=48G, tool-capable gather=[gemma4:26b,llama3.1:8b]): /model show/set/reset wording; off-allowlist sticky rejection that re-states the UNCHANGED preference; gather non-tool-capable rejection (new reason_code model_not_tool_capable); per-request --model= rejection carried from 088 verbatim (default line updated to deepseek-r1:32b); over-envelope rejection carried from 088; attribution footer with source tags ('your default' / 'this question'; system-default stays footer-less per Principle 6 / spec.md section 11) + dual 'gather: .. · synth: ..' form when a gather override is active; extended HTTP invoke envelope (model_source + gather_model + gather_model_source + rejected_turn) mirroring internal/api/agent_invoke.go openKnowledgeRejectionEnvelope; new claim-bound GET/PUT/DELETE /v1/agent/model preference route keyed on actor_user_id (Bot.resolveActorUserID / PASETO bearer); precedence+source table (per-request > sticky > SST default); operator hot-swap runbook (Fork D ~15s core-recreate; verify via the REAL 'open-knowledge subsystem wired ... synthesis_model=' boot log at cmd/core/wiring_assistant_openknowledge.go + the live envelope model/model_source); latency expectation-setting (existing thinking indicator suffices; ~1.9x slower default, WriteTimeout=(6+1)*600s unchanged). Appended '## UI Wireframes' (surface note, screen inventory, UX9 UI primitives ModelSelectionCarrier/StickyPreference/SelectionRejection/ModelAttribution, voice contract, 5 screen mockups, operate-plane runbook) + '## User Flows' (5 mermaid flows a-e) to spec.md. UX input to forks A/B/C/D recorded (recommend separate --gather-model= for Fork C; set/get-one/delete for Fork B; document the 15s recreate for Fork D). UX1/UX8 gates pass; no sidecar UX files; only execution metadata written (no certification.* mutation). No code; no agent dispatch; no commit/push (C9). Next: bubbles.design.

Design phase (parent-expanded full-delivery). Authored specs/089/design.md after verifying EVERY integration point against committed code. Resolved all four forks with decision+rationale+recorded-alternative each. Fork A: deepseek-r1:32b standing default + raise environments.home-lab.ollama_memory_limit 28G->48G + ADD an explicit standing-default (synthesis_model_id) co-residence guard to validateModelEnvelopes (closes the CT-6 gap: today only switchable entries + the interactive bucket are envelope-checked, NOT the every-query standing default) + rely on the Docker OLLAMA_MEMORY_LIMIT cgroup cap as the real-KV-cache bound (the A/B proved the cap CONSTRAINS ollama context: 48G -> 82 GiB used / 26 free, no pressure) + document headroom; do NOT bump model_memory_profiles[deepseek-r1:32b]=22528 (shared q4 ceiling); recorded safer alt 7b-default+sticky-32b (rejected, owner chose 32b for the Q1+Q4 fixes, 7b stays switchable as the speed escape hatch); F-FOOTPRINT (explicit synthesis num_ctx bound) deferred. Fork B: NEW internal/db/migrations/059_user_model_preferences.sql (actor_user_id PK, synthesis_model NOT NULL, gather_model reserved nullable, updated_at) + new modelpref.Store leaf pkg (Get PK-lookup/Set upsert/Clear delete); claim-bound via msg.UserID (Bot.resolveActorUserID, CT-3) on Telegram + auth.UserIDFromContext (CT-2; /v1/agent/invoke already behind bearerAuthMiddleware, router.go:598) on HTTP; rejected reuse of recommendation_preference_corrections. Fork C: SEPARATE --gather-model= / gather_model (per-request only) gated by a NEW assistant.open_knowledge.tool_capable_gather_models SST set (home-lab [gemma4:26b,llama3.1:8b]); extend modelswitch.Override{+GatherModel} + Agent.WithModelOverride to re-point cfg.Model; ReasonNotToolCapable; rejected the combined-flag (FR-8 hazard); F-STICKY-GATHER deferred. Fork D: documented ~15s core-recreate IS the hot-swap (edit SST -> config generate -> overlay recreates core --no-deps -> verify via wiring_assistant_openknowledge.go:275 boot log + live envelope); F-HOTRELOAD (zero-downtime reload) deferred. Designed the single precedence resolver modelswitch.ResolveEffective (per-request > sticky > SST default; orphaned-sticky->default; source classification) as the ONE resolution point both fast-paths (facade.go:1064 runOpenKnowledgeDirect + agent_invoke.go:148) consume; attribution via TurnResult.Model/+GatherModel + Effective sources -> outputEnvelope model/model_source/gather_model/gather_model_source + extended contracts.ModelAttribution footer (source tags + dual gather form, only-on-override). FR-13 in-scope: stripContractScaffolding on the salvage arms (the residual <CITATIONS> leak vector at agent.go:497/526). FR-14 verified: synthesisNeedsRetry('')->true so budget=1 DID fire one retry on the 32b Q6 blank; mechanism correct, add a regression; F-RETRYBUDGET (budget 1->2, WriteTimeout 4200->4800s) deferred as an operator knob. Latency: WriteTimeout=(6+1)*600s=4200s UNCHANGED (no added turns; A/B worst /ask 830s within envelope). 24-row file-by-file change manifest; trust-invariant matrix (cite-back/provenance/capture/<think>-strip+retry all model-/selection-agnostic, C6 no SST mutation); Complexity Tracking + 4 findings. No code; no agent dispatch; no commit (C9). Next owner: bubbles.plan.

Plan phase (parent-expanded full-delivery). Authored specs/089/scopes.md, scenario-manifest.json, and the report.md skeleton from the design's resolved Forks A-D + 24-item change manifest. Four sequential, dependency-ordered, scope-gated scopes: SCOPE-01 (foundation:true) SST persistent deepseek-r1:32b default + ollama_memory_limit 28G->48G + switchable += 32b + NEW tool_capable_gather_models set + the standing-default co-residence guard in validateModelEnvelopes closing the CT-6 gap (CHANGE 1,2,3,4,21; covers SCN-089-A06; reinforces A01/A07; 13 DoD items); SCOPE-02 migration 059_user_model_preferences.sql + modelpref leaf store Get/Set/Clear claim-bound on actor_user_id (CHANGE 8,9; covers A02,A04; reinforces A03; 12 DoD items); SCOPE-03 (core spine) modelswitch Override{+GatherModel}/Effective/ResolveEffective/ResolveGather + agent WithModelOverride gather clone + TurnResult.GatherModel + stripContractScaffolding + substrate_tool source/gather envelope + facade + agent_invoke /ask resolve>validate>clone>run>attribute + wiring (CHANGE 5,6,7,10,11,15,16,20a,22; covers A01,A05,A07,A08,A09,A10,A12; reinforces A02/A04/A11; 15 DoD items); SCOPE-04 telegram /model + --gather-model= + source-tagged dual footer + HTTP GET/PUT/DELETE /v1/agent/model + gather_model field + docs/Operations.md hot-swap runbook (CHANGE 12,13,14,17,18,19,20b,23; covers A03,A11,A13; reinforces A02/A04/A08/A12; 14 DoD items). scenario-manifest.json binds SCN-089-A01..A13 -> scope -> planned concrete test names (house style matching spec 088). All DoD checkboxes UNCHECKED (anti-fabrication); each scope carries Tier-1 universal (artifact-lint/check/format EXIT-0, no dollar-brace-default G028, REAL terminal evidence, do-not-touch spec-083/073, WriteTimeout 4200s restated) + Tier-2 role-specific DoD; adversarial RED-before/GREEN-after + fake-LLM unit agent tests; trust invariants preserved under any selection; claim-bound sticky (spec 044). artifact-lint.sh PASSED (6 artifacts). Terminal posture validated-in-repo, NO commit/push; the live deploy (persist 48G + 32b default + pull-on-deploy + ensure-32b-resident + re-verify) is a separate downstream bubbles.devops dispatch. Next owner: bubbles.implement (SCOPE-01 first).

policySnapshot.modelMatrixChanged: No NEW model added to model_memory_profiles (deepseek-r1:32b is already profiled at 22528 MiB). This spec (a) PROMOTES the home-lab persistent default synthesis model from deepseek-r1:7b -> deepseek-r1:32b via the committed environments.home-lab.assistant_open_knowledge_synthesis_model_id override (quality-first; owner directive), (b) RAISES environments.home-lab.ollama_memory_limit 28G -> >=48G so gemma4:26b gather + deepseek-r1:32b synthesis are co-resident-consistent (profile sum 40960 MiB; measured ~45824 MiB), (c) ADDS deepseek-r1:32b to the home-lab assistant.open_knowledge.switchable_models set, and (d) EXTENDS runtime selection from spec-088's per-request-synthesis-only to a four-axis capability: persistent-default x per-user-sticky x per-request x (gather + synthesis turn). The §2 footprint concern is captured as FR-2/NFR-3/C2: the profile number understates the real KV-cache footprint at the pipeline's 128000-token budget, so the standing-default headroom MUST be verified safe co-resident with the ingestion pipeline (design decides profile-based vs real-footprint-aware guard / synthesis num_ctx bound). Envelope/profile consistency stays fail-loud in validateModelEnvelopes + modelswitch.NewAllowlist (G028 / FR-2 / FR-9).

planningOnlyJustification: Full-delivery greenfield spec that EXTENDS spec 088 (adds a persistent-default SST selection + a per-user sticky selector + a gather-turn runtime override + a documented prod hot-swap procedure; does not amend 088's closed per-request path). Planning packets from the analyst -> ux -> design -> plan prelude are materialised into spec.md / design.md / scopes.md / scenario-manifest.json. Implementation continues in the same spec under workflowMode=full-delivery; no separate implementation spec. Terminal posture is validated-in-repo: the live home-lab deploy (persist the raised envelope + the deepseek-r1:32b persistent default + pull-on-deploy + the live re-verify) is a SEPARATE downstream bubbles.devops dispatch; this spec ships and validates the persistent-selection + sticky + gather-override + hot-swap primitive in-repo only (no commit/push here).

ownerDirective.summary: 'We should be able to hot-swap models in prod via config, and the previously-mentioned commands in telegram, api, other surfaces too.' Plus, after a live 3-way home-lab A/B (docs/experiments/open-knowledge-synthesis-model-ab.md), the owner chose 'do c' = BOTH: (a) wire deepseek-r1:32b as the PERSISTENT DEFAULT synthesis model in committed SST (quality-first; 32b fixed the Q1 comparison false-balance and the Q4 multi-hop hallucination at ~1.9x latency, both already multi-minute), keeping deepseek-r1:7b switchable for speed, AND (b) build the HOT-SWAP feature: operator + per-user model control for the open-knowledge /ask agent with parity across Telegram + web/HTTP + any other transport surface. Picks up the two items spec 088 deferred: F-STICKY (per-user sticky /model <id> selector that persists) and F-TOOLMODEL (a runtime override for the gather/tool-calling model, not just synthesis). The §2 critical engineering concern MUST be captured as a hard requirement: the model_memory_profiles number (deepseek-r1:32b=22528 MiB) UNDERSTATES the real KV-cache-dominated footprint (~64 GB at 131072 context) at the pipeline's per_query_token_budget=128000, so making 32b the blanket default raises memory-pressure risk co-resident with the ingestion pipeline; the persistent-default footprint headroom MUST be verified safe (or synthesis context constrained), and design must decide whether the profile-based envelope check suffices or needs a real-footprint-aware guard. Preserve ALL spec-064/084/087/088 trust invariants under ANY model/selection (cite-back, provenance/no-zero-source, capture-as-fallback inviolable, <think>-strip + retry-before-salvage). SST/NO-DEFAULTS/fail-loud (G028). Untrusted per-request/per-user model strings allowlist-validated before any Ollama call; sticky preference claim-bound to the spec-044 authenticated user, not spoofable. Honour the spec-084/087 latency invariant (WriteTimeout=(max_iterations+synthesis_retry_budget)*llm_timeout_ms). Capture the A/B-surfaced output-hygiene (<think>/<CITATIONS> leak) + forced-final empty-output (32b Q6 blank) reliability items. Deployment-ownership boundary: real per-target topology stays in the operator overlay; generic model tags + abstract per-env config stay in committed smackerel.yaml. Do NOT touch the spec-083 card-rewards WIP. Do NOT commit/push (bubbles.devops owns the live deploy + re-verify).
ownerDirective.dependencyChain: 064 -> 084 -> 087 -> 088 -> 089. Spec 089 depends directly on spec 088's per-request synthesis override (modelswitch validator + Agent.WithModelOverride clone + switchable_models allowlist + model attribution) and transitively on the 064/084/087 loop + trust perimeter + spec-087 split synthesis model. MUST NOT regress the 9 spec-084 + 7 spec-087 agent tests or the spec-088 suite.
designForks: Fork A — default choice: owner DECIDED deepseek-r1:32b as the standing default (quality-first; fixes Q1 false-balance + Q4 hallucination); design VERIFIES the §2 footprint headroom (real KV-cache at 128K ctx co-resident with ingestion) and the NFR-2 latency (32b synthesis roundtrip within llm_timeout_ms; baseline worst case within WriteTimeout) and decides profile-based vs real-footprint-aware envelope guard. Alternative flagged: 7b-default + prominent sticky 32b (safer footprint/latency).

Fork B — per-user preference store: NEW table/column vs reuse an existing per-user store (e.g. the spec-039 recommendation_preference_corrections actor-keyed pattern, internal/db/migrations/022_recommendations.sql) vs a lightweight KV. No general per-user prefs store exists today (only telegram/per_user_token.go). Decide store + schema + hot-path read.

Fork C — gather-override semantics (F-TOOLMODEL): a single --model= / sticky selection re-points BOTH gather and synthesis turns vs a separate --gather-model= flag / sticky knob (+ API field) targeting the gather turn independently. Interacts with the gather tool-capability constraint (FR-8) and the latency multiplier across max_iterations (NFR-2).

Fork D — hot-swap mechanism: documented ~15s core-recreate (edit deployed env + recreate core --no-deps, proven in the A/B) vs true zero-downtime config-hot-reload (config-watch + in-place model-registry reload). Recommend right-sizing: 15s core-recreate likely sufficient; defer zero-downtime reload unless cheap.

completedPhaseClaims.summary: Analyst artifacts authored and grounded in committed architecture. Defined the Outcome Contract (intent / success signal / failure-refusal / failure-condition), the §2 footprint-headroom concern as a hard requirement, 13 BDD scenarios SCN-089-A01..A13 (persistent 32b default applied; sticky /model set/show/reset + persists; sticky claim-bound per user; selection precedence override>sticky>default; footprint-headroom guard; gather override + tool-capability constraint; off-allowlist rejected fail-loud on every surface; output-hygiene no-scaffolding-leak; forced-final reliability; multi-surface parity; model+source attribution; prod hot-swap procedure), FR-1..FR-16, NFR-1..NFR-7, hard constraints C1..C9, and the four design forks A-D handed to ux/design. Product Principle Alignment cites Principle 8 + Principle 2 primary (with 6 + 4 inherited). No code; no agent dispatch; no commit/push (C9).

UX artifacts authored. uservalidation.md maps SCN-089-A01..A13 to operator-checkable acceptance items (all UNCHECKED, pre-implementation) and carries the verbatim command/help/rejection/attribution strings, the precedence+source attribution table, the gather-override + dual-attribution wording, the claim-bound HTTP /v1/agent/model preference route, and the operator hot-swap runbook (Fork D). spec.md gains '## UI Wireframes' (UX9 primitives + 5 mockups) and '## User Flows' (5 mermaid flows a-e). Fail-loud register and claim-binding preserved; system-default footer stays invisible (Principle 6 / spec section 11). Grounded in committed config + internal/api/agent_invoke.go + cmd/core/wiring_assistant_openknowledge.go. No code; no dispatch; no commit.

Design artifact authored and grounded in committed code (every seam verified: modelswitch.Allowlist/Resolve/Override + Agent.WithModelOverride clone + TurnResult.Model + facade.go:1064/1235 + agent_invoke.go:148 + router.go:598 bearer auth + auth.UserIDFromContext + Bot.resolveActorUserID + validateModelEnvelopes switchable pass + model_memory_profiles + home-lab env block + migration-022 actor-keyed pattern + synthesisNeedsRetry/stripThinkBlocks). Decision Record resolves Forks A-D (A=32b default+48G envelope+standing-default co-residence guard+cgroup-cap-as-real-KV-bound; B=new user_model_preferences table+modelpref store; C=separate --gather-model= + tool_capable_gather_models set; D=~15s core-recreate). Single precedence resolver (ResolveEffective), per-user pref store + 059 migration + claim-binding, gather carrier + tool-capability guard, attribution+source wiring, persistent-default SST edits, FR-13/FR-14 in-scope decision, multi-surface parity seam, latency analysis (WriteTimeout 4200s unchanged), footprint-headroom resolution, 24-item change manifest, trust-invariants-unchanged matrix, Complexity Tracking, findings (F-HOTRELOAD/F-STICKY-GATHER/F-FOOTPRINT/F-RETRYBUDGET). Design Brief at top for human steering. No code; no dispatch; no commit.

Plan artifacts authored: scopes.md (4 sequential dependency-ordered scopes with Gherkin->concrete-test Test Plans + tiered DoD, all UNCHECKED), scenario-manifest.json (SCN-089-A01..A13 -> scope -> planned tests, house style matching spec 088), report.md skeleton (evidence-policy header + 24-change manifest map + per-scope PENDING sections). SCOPE-01 foundation (SST 32b default + 48G envelope + tool_capable_gather_models + standing-default co-residence guard / CT-6) -> SCOPE-02 (modelpref store + migration 059, claim-bound) -> SCOPE-03 (precedence resolver + gather override + attribution core spine) -> SCOPE-04 (multi-surface affordances + parity + hot-swap docs). artifact-lint.sh PASSED (6 artifacts). No code; no dispatch; no commit. Next: bubbles.implement.

Security phase complete (parent-expanded full-delivery). Diagnostic read-only review of the spec-089 changeset (36 modified + 8 new files; go.mod/go.sum/ml manifests UNCHANGED). All six threat-model items PASS with code evidence: (1) claim-binding/IDOR -- Telegram resolveActorUserID + HTTP PASETO subject (403 if absent), PUT body is {model}-only, store keyed WHERE actor_user_id=$1 parameterized; (2) arbitrary model-string passthrough -- validate-before-call + short-circuit (facade ResolveEffective->break no agent/no capture; HTTP writeOpenKnowledgeRejection; exact-match allowlist); (3) stored-input safety -- validated at SET + re-validated at READ, orphaned sticky->default+WARN, parameterized SQL; (4) injection -- model id is a JSON field on a fixed URL, /model reply plain text, footer MarkdownV2-escaped; (5) footprint/DoS -- standing-default co-residence guard + cgroup OLLAMA_MEMORY_LIMIT + per-user USD pre-flight + WriteTimeout 4200s; (6) SST/secrets/supply-chain -- no fallback-default, additive migration, no new secret/egress/dependency. Adversarial-test authenticity audited (store claim-binding RED-before; HTTP body-spoof; off-allowlist short-circuit). One informational no-action note (INFO-089-SEC-1: model-string not explicitly length-capped, safe via bounded readers + exact-match allowlist). Verdict: SECURE. No secret value read/logged/echoed. nextRequiredOwner=bubbles.validate.

Audit phase complete (parent-expanded full-delivery; final policy + ship-readiness sign-off). All 7 audit-checklist items independently re-verified by this phase (not trusted from prior sections): (1) NO-DEFAULTS/SST G028 -- git diff of config.sh/smackerel.yaml/all *.go shows ZERO ${VAR:-default}/getEnv(k,default)/unwrap_or added; tool_capable_gather_models REQUIRED+fail-loud (openknowledge.go Validate early-returns when disabled, rejects empty/missing-baseline when enabled); standing-default co-residence guard in config.go::validateModelEnvelopes fail-loud + correct (32b 22528 + gemma4:26b 18432 = 40960 > 28672 refused / <= 49152 accepted); 48G envelope consistent. (2) Trust perimeter -- WithModelOverride clones + re-points only cfg.Model/SynthesisModel, singleton untouched (C6), zero override=byte-for-byte baseline; facade rejection short-circuits BEFORE agent+capture (Rejection != capture-skip); cite-back/provenance/capture/<think>-strip/retry-before-salvage run on turn OUTPUT model-agnostic; stripContractScaffolding on salvage arms (FR-13). (3) Claim-binding (security-critical) -- HTTP agent_model.go subject=auth.UserIDFromContext, 403 if absent, PUT body carries only {model}, route behind bearerAuthMiddleware; telegram model_command.go resolveActorUserID; store parameterized+actor-scoped (WHERE actor_user_id=$1); migration 059 PK actor_user_id, no DB default; the new attack surface is genuinely closed, SECURE verdict is real. (4) Deployment boundary -- pii-scan clean (EXIT 0); home-lab overrides are generic model tags + abstract env config, no hostnames/IPs/tailnet/secrets; deploy/contract.yaml = one abstract sstKeyCatalog entry. (5) Principle 8 (model+source attribution wired into envelope + fail-loud rejection) + Principle 2 (quality-first 32b default) genuinely satisfied, not asserted; no deviation; Principle 10/QF not engaged. (6) Do-not-touch git-porcelain EMPTY; out-of-changeset guard noise (G028 ml/app/main.py:257 spec-083 commit 124b995d; spec-073 web/client; G089 dep on blocked spec-088) attributable by file path, NOT spec-089. (7) Terminal status blocked/validated-in-repo is CORRECT (not forced done, not fabricated); state-transition-guard EXIT 1 (35 fail/8 warn) correctly refuses done-promotion; artifact-lint EXIT 0 (anti-fab clean, status matches certification); the minor precedent-hygiene deviations (Check 4B [x] Done, deferred F-FOOTPRINT/F-RETRYBUDGET, guard-heuristic vs G068 PASS) are NOT ship-blocking. Verdict: SHIP_IT (in-repo) -- no ship-blocker beyond the known devops handoff. Status held at blocked, certifiedAt null (NOT promoted past the validated-in-repo ceiling). notes: Analyst phase complete (parent-expanded full-delivery). spec.md authored with the §2 footprint-headroom engineering concern captured as a hard requirement (the model_memory_profiles=22528 MiB profile understates deepseek-r1:32b's real ~64 GB KV-cache footprint at the pipeline's 128000-token budget; the standing-default headroom MUST be verified safe co-resident with ingestion). 13 scenarios SCN-089-A01..A13, FR-1..FR-16, NFR-1..NFR-7, C1..C9, and four design forks A-D (A=32b default owner-decided/design-verifies-headroom; B=per-user store; C=gather-override semantics; D=hot-swap mechanism) handed forward. specDependsOn=[specs/088-runtime-switchable-models]; do-not-touch carried forward; principleAlignment includes Principle 8 + Principle 2. Trust perimeter (cite-back / provenance / capture / <think>-strip + retry-before-salvage) preserved model-/selection-agnostically. Terminal posture validated-in-repo; the live home-lab deploy (raised envelope + 32b persistent default + pull-on-deploy + re-verify) is a downstream bubbles.devops dispatch. Next owner: bubbles.ux. UX phase complete (parent-expanded full-delivery): authored uservalidation.md (SCN-089-A01..A13 operator-checkable acceptance items, all UNCHECKED pre-implementation) with the verbatim /model set/show/reset wording, the off-allowlist sticky rejection (preference-unchanged), the gather non-tool-capable rejection (model_not_tool_capable), the precedence+source attribution table, the dual gather/synth footer, the claim-bound HTTP GET/PUT/DELETE /v1/agent/model preference route + extended invoke envelope (model_source/gather_model/gather_model_source/rejected_turn), and the operator hot-swap runbook (Fork D ~15s core-recreate). Appended '## UI Wireframes' + '## User Flows' to spec.md (Telegram/API/runbook mockups + 5 mermaid flows a-e). UX recommendations to design: Fork C = separate --gather-model= flag (do NOT overload --model=, which would risk a non-tool-capable gather); Fork B = set/get-one/delete keyed on actor_user_id; the bare system-default path stays footer-less (Principle 6 / section 11) with '(system default)' attribution surfaced via /model + the always-on API envelope. UX1/UX8 gates pass; no sidecar UX files; execution metadata only (certification.* untouched). Next owner: bubbles.design.
